title: Anthropic Releases 'Mythos Class' AI Model As Mega-Startup Preps IPO
full_text: Anthropic launched a "Mythos class" model Tuesday, which the AI startup said has been designed to be safe for general use. The release of Claude Fable 5 comes two months after Anthropic previewed a powerful Mythos model that it warned could pose cybersecurity risks. Fable 5 is the most capable model Anthropic has made generally available, the company said. "Releasing…
